title: How to get the year, month, or day from a date
task: Split a date into its parts — for grouping by year, filtering by month, or rebuilding dates.
keywords: day of month formula google sheets

excel.note: MONTH(A2) gives 1-12, DAY(A2) gives 1-31. DATE(y,m,d) reassembles them.

explanation: YEAR, MONTH, and DAY each return a plain number from a date (the verification packs all three into 20260723 to prove each one). They're the building blocks for grouping (sum by year), conditions (MONTH(A2)=7), and date surgery — e.g. "same day next year" is DATE(YEAR(A2)+1,MONTH(A2),DAY(A2)). If they return #VALUE!, your "date" is text — convert it first (see the convert-text-to-date recipe).
